title: 12 CRA Business Taxes
body_text:
12	CRA Business Taxes
12.1	Overview of CRA Business Taxes
Business Taxes is a product on the
PaymentStream
TM
Direct platform that allows you to
submit CRA business tax filings and payments electronically, and
view filings and remittance history in
PaymentStream
Direct Administration.
Note:	Business Taxes isnât connected to your banking system.
Business Taxes has two environments: test and production. The test environment is used for training purposes only. The production environment is used for submitting filings and payments to CRA via Central 1.
CRA remittance vouchers that are available on Business Taxes are filed electronically along with the payment. CRA remittance vouchers that arenât available on Business Taxes canât be processed electronically and must be sent to CRA by mail or courier.
See the CRA Business Taxes Part for the following information:
Legal and policy considerations
Workflow Options
User set-up and access to Business Taxes
Process of remittance vouchers (manual and electronic filing)
Reconstruction of CRA voucher bundles lost in transit
Settlement, reports, and reconciliation
END
